summary.en-US: Light smoked-lilac Firefox theme with purple active-tab accents and dark plum text.

description.en-US: Smoked Lilac Purple is a light Firefox theme using a muted lilac browser frame, soft purple surfaces, dark plum text, and restrained violet accents. It is designed to feel purple without becoming pale, washed out, or painfully cute.

version.approval_notes: Static Firefox theme. Contains only manifest.json, local icon PNG files, and README.md. No scripts, no permissions, no remote resources, no tracking, no analytics, and no data collection or transmission.
